$comment: Minimal schema registry (Task 7.3) — per spec §7.1, the heavy chain-computer/registry-template machinery donor built around this file is PRE-EXCLUDED for 0.2. This file only enumerates page types actually stamped by something in this repo (wiki-skeleton templates + the routine-spec migrations), each with its current schema version and the ordered chain of migration directory names to walk from any older version up to current.
